mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(SUM(IF(, d.last_value, NULL)), 1) FROM site s JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT id_site FROM device WHERE `status` = 1 AND is_delete = 0 AND id_device_type IN (3,7,9) AND is_excluded_meter = 0 ) meter ON meter.id_site = s.id JOIN device d ON d.id_site = s.id WHERE s.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL) AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND IF(meter.id_site IS NOT NULL, d.id_device_type IN (3,7,9) AND d.is_excluded_meter = 0, d.id_device_type = 1)

SELECT id, name AS siteName, CASE WHEN percentFail > 90 THEN 6 WHEN percentFail > 80 THEN 5 WHEN percentFail > 50 THEN 4 WHEN percentFail > 40 THEN 3 WHEN percentFail > 20 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS priorityLevel, address, tableDataReport, timezone, percentFail
FROM ( SELECT s.id, s.name, CONCAT_WS(', ',s.city, s.state) AS address, s.table_data_report AS tableDataReport, tz.value AS timezone, ROUND(SUM(IF(inv.communication = 0, 1, 0))/NULLIF(COUNT(inv.id),0)*100, 1) AS percentFail, SUM(IF(inv.communication = 0, 1, 0)) AS invDisconenct, COUNT(inv.id) AS totalInv FROM site s JOIN time_zone tz ON tz.id = s.id_time_zone
JOIN ( SELECT sem.id_site FROM site_employee_map sem WHERE sem.id_employee = #{userId} ) se ON se.id_site = s.id
JOIN ( SELECT d.id, d.id_site, CASE WHEN al.error_code IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS communication FROM device d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.id_device, e.error_code FROM alert a JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND e.error_code = "1001" ) al ON al.id_device = d.id WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_device_type = 1 GROUP BY d.id ) inv ON inv.id_site = s.id WHERE s.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', tz.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL) GROUP BY s.id ) sub ORDER BY percentFail DESC, name

SELECT
COUNT(*) AS value, DATE_FORMAT(a.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as time FROM alert a JOIN device d ON d.id = a.id_device WHERE d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_site = #{siteId} AND a.start_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY time

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) AS value, DATE_FORMAT(a.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as time FROM device d JOIN alert a ON d.id = a.id_device JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error WHERE d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_site = #{siteId} AND d.id_device_type = 1 AND a.start_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND e.error_code = "1001" GROUP BY time
